features: DUAL OUTPUT- Our Daewoo compact mains charging adaptor has twin USB-A ports with 2.1A output, meaning you can fast charge two devices simultaneously.
SMART PROTECTION- With over-heat, over-current, and over-charging protection, charging will be automatically stopped when battery is full
COMPACT DESIGN- Easily fits in any tight corner, our adaptor will fit snuggly without the risk of being pulled out and disconnected
PREMIUM QUALITY- Made of the highest quality heat-resistant aluminium, with reinforced anti-scratch coating designed to last.
WARNING: DO NOT USE IF THE PRODUCT HAS COME INTO CONTACT WITH LIQUID, IS DAMAGED OR OVERHEATS
